<!--
  WRONG: Closes #50, #80, #85   <- GitHub only closes #50; the rest are merely referenced
  WRONG: Closes #50 #80 #85     <- same problem — only #50 is closed
  RIGHT: one keyword per issue, one issue per line:
    Closes #50
    Closes #80
    Closes #85
-->
